treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with throat pain, difficulty breathing, and had severe tonsillar hypertrophy.
Patient received IV Unasyn, dexamethasone, and racemic epinephrine.
Discharge medications provided including Amoxicillin-Clavulanic Acid and tapering doses of Methylprednisolone.
Patient was discharged in stable condition with improved symptoms.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with PCP in 1 week, ENT for severe OSA, and repeat chest X-ray in a few weeks.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient felt better and was medically stable for discharge.
